zh.lifeSummary: 當John Aldrich於1538年出生在英國諾福爾可曼格林 霍爾時，他的父親Thomas Aldrich37歲，母親Ciceley Bishop27歲。他和Margaret Bacon至少有4個兒子和6個女兒。他去世於1592年6月3日在英國英格蘭素福爾可盧包享年54歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可盧包。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Aldrich于1538年出生在英国諾福爾可曼格林 霍爾时，他的父亲Thomas Aldrich37岁，母亲Ciceley Bishop27岁。他和Margaret Bacon至少有4个儿子和6个女儿。他去世于1592年6月3日在英国英格兰素福爾可盧包享年54岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可盧包。

nameMeanings.name: Aldrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Aldridge 1, from the Middle English personal names Alrich or Elrich and Aldrich or Eldrich.
History: The earliest recorded bearer of this surname in North America is George Alrich, who came from Derbyshire to MA in 1631.

variants.name: Arledge
meanings: English: variant of   Aldrich   or   Aldridge  . A few bearers of the name are recorded in southern England in the 17th–19th centuries, but the name appears to have died out in Britain.
History: Isaac Arledge died in Fairfield County, SC, in 1790.

variants.name: Aldridge
meanings: from the Middle English personal names Alrich or Elrich and Aldrich or Eldrich, representing any one of three Old English personal names, Æthelrīc, Ælfrīc, and Ealdrīc, formed respectively from æthel- ‘noble’, ælf ‘elf, sprite’, and (e)ald ‘old, honored’ + rīc ‘ruler’.

habitational name from Aldridge (Staffordshire), Aldridge Grove in Hampden (Buckinghamshire), or from a similarly named unidentified place in the West Midlands, recorded in Domesday Book as Alrewic, from Old English alor ‘alder’ + wīc ‘specialized farmstead’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When John Aldrich was born in 1538, in Mangreen Hall, Norfolk, England, his father, Thomas Aldrich, was 37 and his mother, Ciceley Bishop, was 27. He had at least 4 sons and 6 daughters with Margaret Bacon. He died on 3 June 1592, in Rumburgh, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54, and was buried in Rumburgh, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Aldrich est né en 1538, à Mangreen Hall, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Aldrich, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Ciceley Bishop, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles avec Margaret Bacon. Il est décédé le 3 juin 1592, à Rumburgh, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Rumburgh, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Aldrich 1538 in Mangreen Hall, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Aldrich 37 und seine Mutter Ciceley Bishop 27. Er hatte mit Margaret Bacon mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 3. Juni 1592 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Rumburgh, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Rumburgh, Suffolk, England begraben.

Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie con Margaret Bacon. Morì il 3 giugno 1592, nel Rumburgh, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Rumburgh, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Aldrichが1538年にイギリスノーフォルクマングレン ハルで生まれた時，父Thomas Aldrichは37歳，母Ciceley Bishopは27歳であった。彼はMargaret Baconとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼は1592年6月3日にイギリスイギリススフォルクルンブルグで54歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクルンブルグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Aldrich(이)가 1538년 영국 노르폴크 만그린 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Aldrich(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Ciceley Bishop(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Margaret Bacon(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1592년 6월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 럼버그h에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 럼버그h에 묻혔다.

Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas com Margaret Bacon. Ele faleceu em 3 de junho de 1592, em Rumburgh, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Rumburgh, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Aldrich родился в 1538 г. в местности мангрин холл, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Aldrich было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Ciceley Bishop, 27. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей от Margaret Bacon. Он умер 3 июня 1592 г. в местности румбург, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности румбург, суффолк, Англия.
